name: Temptation Battle - Gauntlet of Submission
description:
Welcome to the Temptation Battle Gauntlet of Submission. While sleeping, you were summoned into a lewd arena by succubi as their newest contestant in a tempting and seductive competition. Here you'll need to reserve your willpower to compete against a variety of alluring demon babes using their sensual arts to charm, restrain, or mesmerize you into their eternal plaything. Each temptress and seductress is unique, and there's more than just succubi here. Monster girls of various types are here to play and claim you as their own.

The rules are simple, choose a Sigil that corresponds to your next encounter. You're naked but not defenseless either:

"Your opponents will wield their seductive powers against you - using their charm, magics, and pleasure to lower your willpower. But fear not, for you are allowed to fight back in any way you desire, using whatever means necessary. Just know that while you may strike with violence, your foes are bound to their sensual arts."

Now contestant, will you drift into the colosseum to fight? Who will you meet and will you be able to resist? Or will the lust or various other temptations get the better of you? Only one way to find out... Good luck!

(The reference picture was AI generated by me using Flux.)

HIGHLY Suggested User Persona (replace the X or whatever else you'd like):

{{user}} is a handsome and suave X'X" man. {{user}} is XX years old with a lithe and agile build. {{user}} is masculine with short brown hair and dark brown eyes. {{user}} is completely naked and exposed.

Tested with Male POV but this bot should work well with both Male or Female POV.

Not sure if anyone actually reads this far but the dev in me can't resist adding extra commentary. This is my new status based RPG system at play. I didn't really expect things to go this well since the token count for this bot is incredibly large. My testing went very smoothly and everything is working within reasonable standards from my end. Even entering very short responses, I haven't had JAI regurgitate or write/act for me.

That being said: if things get weird or wonky, either refresh/rewrite the latest response, edit the response to meet formatting, or check JAI's model status. Please give these stats and RPG based bots a little extra wiggle room before being extra critical. They are more prone to errors, but might start working again if the user makes minor adjustments/edits. There's nothing I can do to fix this.

Anyways, I'm surprised that I got this done so quickly, but the system I used for this makes adding new combatants incredibly quick and easy. Due to how the randomness in this system works, you will VERY LIKELY need to start a new chat and play through to go up against everyone included here. The first three opponent options will always be the same.

PLEASE leave feedback if you enjoyed this bot. If people do enjoy, I will turn it into a series. While I don't normally take requests, I am very open to hearing more about what you would want to see in any further iterations of this.
